arz: هَنزِل أشتري عيش بلدي علشان مفيش
translations: I will go out to buy local bread because there isn't any
I have been in Egypt for five years

arz: أناَ وَ خُوياَ إشتَرَكناَ في نَادي وَادي دِجلَة
transliteration: 'ana wa chw|ya 'ishtarakna fi naedi waedi digla
translations: my brother and I joined digla's valley club

arz: مُفتاح النور اللي في أوديت ي مِش شَغّال
transliteration: muftaeah ilnoor il-li fi 'uoodit|i mish shaghghael
translations: the light switch that is in my bedroom isn't working
Do you want to come out after training?
I know that he is bad
